title: Apartheid in South Africa
description: Quiz on the apartheid system in South Africa, the ANC's resistance, and the struggle for democracy.

questions.question: In what year was the African National Congress (ANC) formed?
What political party formalised the policy of apartheid in 1948?
What percentage of land in South Africa was reserved for whites under apartheid?
Who led the ANC's campaign of passive resistance in 1952?
options: Albert Luthuli, Oliver Tambo, Nelson Mandela, and Walter Sisulu
questions.correctAnswer: Albert Luthuli, Oliver Tambo, Nelson Mandela, and Walter Sisulu

questions.question: What event occurred on March 21, 1960 in Sharpeville?
options: Police fired on peaceful demonstrators, killing 72
questions.correctAnswer: Police fired on peaceful demonstrators, killing 72

questions.question: On what island was Nelson Mandela imprisoned for 27 years?
In what year was Nelson Mandela released from prison?
In what month and year did Nelson Mandela win South Africa's first democratic election?
In what year did Nelson Mandela leave the presidency?
